query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Michigan evidence on disk explicitly preserves statewide Protection and Advocacy designation text.

samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights Michigan (DRM) is the federally mandated protection and advocacy system for Michigan. Formerly Michigan Protection & Advocacy Services, Inc.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Michigan Alliance for Families evidence on disk explicitly preserves statewide PTIC designation text plus direct contact routing.

samples.evidence_snippet: Michigan Alliance for Families is our state's federally funded Parent Training and Information Center. Michigan Alliance for Families: Your free guide to special education. Connect directly with one of our regional Parent Mentors. 1-800-552-4821. info@michiganallianceforfamilies.org.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party statewide legal-help access source.

samples.evidence_snippet: The Michigan Legal Help homepage is live and explicitly preserves statewide legal help and legal aid access language for the state.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed likely official local-office lane for Michigan county/local disability routing.
blocker_evidence: The official MDHHS county-offices root is live and exposes county and regional office leaves plus a composite county directory, but the current packet still has zero reviewed county_offices rows and the composite directory exceeded a bounded low-token fetch window.

samples.evidence_snippet: The live county-offices root links to county leaves like Genesee County and Macomb County, regional leaves like West Michigan and Urban Counties, and the official Composite Directory listing.
The official Genesee County page is live and identified as 'Genesee County DHS Offices', but the packet has not yet converted the live county and regional leaves into reviewed county_offices rows.
The official composite directory appears in the live county-offices root, but a bounded low-token fetch exceeded the allowed window before returning usable evidence.
